languages.text:
{n}Высокий худосочный человек поспешно поворачивается к вам. Фартук на нем испачкан темным, худые руки по локоть затянуты в медицинские перчатки.{/n}
"Светлейш{mf|ий|ая} Лорд-капитан! Прошу прощения за вид". {n}Медикарий низко кланяется.{/n} "Меня зовут Джейс Мартинакс, и я служу вивисектором в Секторе Бионика. Несказанная честь приветствовать вас здесь, на нашей палубе".

traits.locale_text:
{n}Высокий худосочный человек поспешно поворачивается к вам. Фартук на нем испачкан темным, худые руки по локоть затянуты в медицинские перчатки.{/n}
"Светлейш{mf|ий|ая} Лорд-капитан! Прошу прощения за вид". {n}Медикарий низко кланяется.{/n} "Меня зовут Джейс Мартинакс, и я служу вивисектором в Секторе Бионика. Несказанная честь приветствовать вас здесь, на нашей палубе".

languages.text:
{n}A tall wisp of a man hurriedly turns to you. He is wearing an apron covered with dark splotches, and his thin arms are sheathed up to the elbow in medical gloves.{/n}
"Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! I apologise for my appearance." {n}The medicae officer bows low.{/n} "My name is Jaze Martinax, and I serve as Vivisector in the Sector Bionica. It is an untold honour to welcome you to our deck."

languages.text:
{n}背の高い痩せた男が慌ててあなたに振り返る。黒いシミがついたエプロンを身につけており、薄い腕は肘まで医療用手袋で覆われている。{/n}
「貴様（御方）！容姿に不快な思いをさせて申し訳ありません。」{n} 医官は深く頭を下げる。{/n}「外科医セカンド・バイビセクター・マルティナックス。セクター・ビオニカへようこそ、と申します」
languages.original_text:
{n}A tall wisp of a man hurriedly turns to you. He is wearing an apron covered with dark splotches, and his thin arms are sheathed up to the elbow in medical gloves.{/n}
"Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! I apologise for my appearance." {n}The medicae officer bows low.{/n} "Chirurgeon Secundaris Vivisector Martinax. It is an unspeakable honour to welcome you to the Sector Bionica."

背の高い痩せた男が慌ててあなたに振り返る。黒いシミがついたエプロンを身につけており、薄い腕は肘まで医療用手袋で覆われている。
「貴様（御方）！容姿に不快な思いをさせて申し訳ありません。」{n} 医官は深く頭を下げる。{n}「外科医セカンド・バイビセクター・マルティナックス。セクター・ビオニカへようこそ、と申します。」

languages.text: {n}İnce uzun bir adam, aceleyle sana dönüyor. Koyu lekelerle kaplı bir önlük giymiş ve ince kollarının dirsek bölümüne kadar tıbbi eldivenler çekmiş.{/n} "{mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri! Görünüşüm için özür dilerim." {n}Sıhhiye subayı, eğilerek selam veriyor.{/n} "Adım Jaze Martinax, Sektör Biyonika'da Dirikesimci olarak görev yapıyorum. Sizi güvertemizde ağırlamak, tarif edilemez bir onur."
languages.original_text:
{n}A tall wisp of a man hurriedly turns to you. He is wearing an apron covered with dark splotches, and his thin arms are sheathed up to the elbow in medical gloves.{/n}
"Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! I apologise for my appearance." {n}The medicae officer bows low.{/n} "My name is Jaze Martinax, and I serve as Vivisector in the Sector Bionica. It is an untold honour to welcome you to our deck."

Koyu lekelerle kaplı bir önlük giymiş ve ince kollarının dirsek bölümüne kadar tıbbi eldivenler çekmiş.{/n} "{mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri! Görünüşüm için özür dilerim." {n}Sıhhiye subayı, eğilerek selam veriyor.{/n} "Adım Jaze Martinax, Sektör Biyonika'da Dirikesimci olarak görev yapıyorum. Sizi güvertemizde ağırlamak, tarif edilemez bir onur."

languages.text:
{n}Un hombre alto y enjuto se gira a toda prisa hacia ti. Lleva un delantal cubierto de manchas oscuras y sus brazos delgados están embutidos hasta el codo en guantes médicos.{/n}
«¡Mi{mf|lord|lady}! Disculpe mi aspecto». {n}El oficial de medicae se inclina profundamente.{/n} «Me llamo Jaze Martinax y ejerzo de vivisector del Sector Bionica. Es un honor inconmensurable darle la bienvenida a nuestra cubierta».
languages.original_text:
{n}A tall wisp of a man hurriedly turns to you. He is wearing an apron covered with dark splotches, and his thin arms are sheathed up to the elbow in medical gloves.{/n}
"Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! I apologise for my appearance." {n}The medicae officer bows low.{/n} "My name is Jaze Martinax, and I serve as Vivisector in the Sector Bionica. It is an untold honour to welcome you to our deck."

«¡Mi{mf|lord|lady}! Disculpe mi aspecto». {n}El oficial de medicae se inclina profundamente.{/n} «Me llamo Jaze Martinax y ejerzo de vivisector del Sector Bionica. Es un honor inconmensurable darle la bienvenida a nuestra cubierta».

languages.text:
{n}一个又高又瘦的男人匆忙转向你。他穿着一件布满暗色污渍的围裙，瘦削的胳膊上套着过肘的医用手套。{/n}
“大人！恕我仪容不整。”{n}这位医务官深鞠一躬。{/n}“我是杰兹·马丁纳克斯，仿生区的解剖者。您能亲临此甲板，实属无上荣光。”
languages.original_text:
{n}A tall wisp of a man hurriedly turns to you. He is wearing an apron covered with dark splotches, and his thin arms are sheathed up to the elbow in medical gloves.{/n}
"Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! I apologise for my appearance." {n}The medicae officer bows low.{/n} "My name is Jaze Martinax, and I serve as Vivisector in the Sector Bionica. It is an untold honour to welcome you to our deck."

{n}一个又高又瘦的男人匆忙转向你。他穿着一件布满暗色污渍的围裙，瘦削的胳膊上套着过肘的医用手套。{/n}
“大人！恕我仪容不整。”{n}这位医务官深鞠一躬。{/n}“我是杰兹·马丁纳克斯，仿生区的解剖者。您能亲临此甲板，实属无上荣光。”

languages.text:
{n}Un homme grand et frêle se tourne précipitamment vers vous. Il porte un tablier couvert de taches sombres et ses bras fins sont enfoncés jusqu'au coude dans des gants médicaux.{/n}
« Votre Seigneurie ! Je vous prie d'excuser mon apparence, {n}dit l'officier de medicae avant de s'incliner.{/n} Je me nomme Jaze Martinax et je suis le vivisecteur du secteur Bionica. C'est un insigne honneur de vous accueillir sur notre pont. »
languages.original_text:
{n}A tall wisp of a man hurriedly turns to you. He is wearing an apron covered with dark splotches, and his thin arms are sheathed up to the elbow in medical gloves.{/n}
"Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! I apologise for my appearance." {n}The medicae officer bows low.{/n} "My name is Jaze Martinax, and I serve as Vivisector in the Sector Bionica. It is an untold honour to welcome you to our deck."

« Votre Seigneurie ! Je vous prie d'excuser mon apparence, {n}dit l'officier de medicae avant de s'incliner.{/n} Je me nomme Jaze Martinax et je suis le vivisecteur du secteur Bionica. C'est un insigne honneur de vous accueillir sur notre pont. »

languages.text:
{n}Ein großer, hagerer Mann wendet sich dir eilig zu. Er trägt eine mit dunklen Flecken bedeckte Schürze, und seine dünnen Arme stecken bis zu den Ellenbogen in medizinischen Handschuhen.{/n}
"Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}! Ich bitte um Verzeihung für mein Aussehen." {n}Der Medicae-Offizier verbeugt sich tief.{/n} "Mein Name ist Jaze Martinax. Ich arbeite als Vivisektor im Sektor Bionica. Es ist eine große Ehre, Euch auf unserem Deck begrüßen zu dürfen."
